title: Update notifications not working correctly via the automations
excerpt: I am using a monday board as a ticketing system. I created an automation so that any time someone updates an Item, the automation will send me a notification to let me know that a change was made to the item. unfortunate…

posts.author: JCouto (John Couto)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using a monday board as a ticketing system. I created an automation so that any time someone updates an Item, the automation will send me a notification to let me know that a change was made to the item. unfortunately I am receiving notifications for EVERYTHING, not just updates. when an item is created, I receive an update notification, If I change the status of an Item, i receive a notification, etc. What am I doing wrong? I created the automation from scratch because I couldn’t find one to match my needs.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JCouto !

Your automation should look like this :

image1589×148 18.5 KB

Or alternatively you could also use the people column (named Supervisor here) :

image1547×145 17.6 KB

If this also notifies you for example when a status is changed, it should not work like that unless there are additional automations or it is bugged.

Alternatively, I would strongly suggest using People columns, as via with the following feature you can get notified for updates to items you are subscribed to without creating additional automations.

image331×546 25 KB

image989×202 12 KB

image751×446 23 KB

Hope this helps!

Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
